name: Potion of Heroism
description:
When you drink this potion, you gain 10 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} that last for 1 hour. For the same duration, you are under the effect of the {@spell Bless|XPHB} spell (no {@status Concentration|XPHB} required).
This potion's blue liquid bubbles and steams as if boiling.
